heading: Other criminal penalties
label: 21144 Other criminal penalties
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15544 of Title 42

children.heading: Conspiracy to deprive voters of a fair election
children.label: a Conspiracy to deprive voters of a fair election
children.text: Any individual who knowingly and willfully gives false information in registering or voting in violation of , or conspires with another to violate such section, shall be fined or imprisoned, or both, in accordance with such section.section 10307(c) of this title

children.heading: False information in registering and voting
children.label: b False information in registering and voting
children.text: Any individual who knowingly commits fraud or knowingly makes a false statement with respect to the naturalization, citizenry, or alien registry of such individual in violation of shall be fined or imprisoned, or both, in accordance with such section.section 1015 of title 18
